revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]</noinclude>
#redirect[[:en:Template:Example needed]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Example needed]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects E
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Example needed]] <noinclude></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Example_needed here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Example_needed for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Fix-span
|link        = {{{link|WP:AUDIENCE}}}
|text        = example{{#switch:{{{1|{{{plural|}}}}}}|yes|plural|pl|s=s}} needed
|title       = {{delink|{{{reason|An editor has requested that {{#switch:{{{1|{{{plural|}}}}}}|yes|plural|pl|s=examples|an example}} be provided.}}}}}
|date        = {{{date|}}}
|pre-text    = {{{pre-text|}}}
|post-text   = {{{post-text|}}}
|cat         = |cat-date    = Category:Articles needing examples
|content     = {{{text|}}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:All articles needing examples]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
